---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

## Description

A clear and concise description of the feature or improvement you're proposing.

## Use Case

Explain the problem this feature would solve or the benefit it would provide.

**Example:**
- As a user, I want to...
- This would help because...

## Proposed Solution

A description of how you would implement this feature, if you have ideas.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative approaches you've thought about.

## Additional Context

Add any other context, screenshots, or examples here.

---

**Before submitting:**
- [ ] I have searched existing issues to avoid duplicates
- [ ] This is not a duplicate of an existing feature request
- [ ] The feature aligns with the project's goals
